name: X-Golf Appleton
address: W3208 Van Roy Rd, Appleton, WI 54915
about: X-Golf Appleton offers an indoor golf experience using advanced simulation technology. The facility features 8 simulators with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide realistic gameplay. Pricing is based on simulator time, not per person, and includes food and beverage options. It is suitable for players of all skill levels, including beginners, and offers leagues, lessons, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy
Full bar and food service available on-site
PGA-certified coaching and club fitting services

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza, appetizers, snacks, and other shareable bites available
Full bar with beer, cocktails, and wine; draft beer, mixed drinks, and specialty cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary system with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available if you don't have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed, as X-Golf has a full bar and kitchen on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for one individual to play 18 holes. Each additional person adds about 1 hour to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
